creator: donaldcallen@gmail.com
text:
I succeeded overnight in getting epiphany updated to the latest version,
using portmaster instead of portupgrade. This included building and
installing this port. Perhaps the symbol complained about in the compilation
error  (GDK_TYPE_APP_LAUNCH_CONTEXT) is defined in a header file in another
port that hadn't yet been updated? So portmaster succeeded because it built
the ports in a different order? Guesswork on my part, but I think this PR
can be closed.
